Sway_Type_Description: 2 points of Yin or Yang or 1 point of each.
2 points if Banal, or Intrepid, 1 Point Bold
1 point of normal Yarn. +1 Tao Sway for Seelie or Unseelie Yarn
1 Twist can be created by magic from 2 Faerie Yarn one Seelie and one Unseelie or 2 of either. The Twist is also related to the Shock, the most powerful form of Stress. Twists are often Shocking.
